name: Tailscale Active Accounts Without Employee Record
description: Detects active Tailscale accounts whose email does not match any employee record.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login_name AS email FROM tailscale_users u LEFT JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.login_name, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.login_name), '') != '' AND e.work_email IS NULL
remediation: Review unmatched accounts, classify approved non-employee identities, and disable unknown access.
